auth_flow.logic: Conditional Stack Rendering based on authStatus

form_handling.standard: React Hook Form (RHF) + Zod for validation
form_handling.best_practice: Atomic inputs with uncontrolled behavior for performance

pagination.state: Manage loadingMore and isRefreshing states independently

offline_support.data_persistence: WatermelonDB or SQLite for complex relational data
offline_support.syncing: Conflict resolution via Last-Write-Wins or custom CRDT
